resumeLength: Prefer one page unless senior or academic

formattingRules.fontRecommendation: Readable professional sans or serif, 10-11pt for body

writingRules.bulletFormula: Action verb + scope/context + method/tool + measurable result
quantificationRules: Use numbers for scope, frequency, scale, revenue, cost, users, latency, accuracy, or time saved when supported by facts.
Do not invent metrics. Ask follow-up questions when source content lacks measurable evidence.

exampleBullets.strong: Automated weekly reporting workflow using SQL and dashboards, reducing manual analysis time and improving stakeholder visibility.
exampleBullets.reason: Starts with a clear action, names method, and explains business impact.

scoringCriteria.description: Aligns content with target role and source expectations.
Uses concrete achievements, scope, and measurable outcomes.
Follows section order, spacing, ATS, and consistency rules.
Avoids inflated, vague, or unsupported claims.

promptSnippets.title: Oxford resume guidance
promptSnippets.content: Apply Oxford guidance: keep the resume concise, evidence-based, consistently formatted, and aligned with the user's selected role.
